response.global_analysis: The video consists of a spoken announcement by the VTuber Ayunda Risu in English. There is no vocal music, only instrumental background. The provided Reference JSON correctly identified the lack of vocal music, but I have transcribed her spoken commentary as per the task requirements. Timestamps are strictly aligned with her vocal audio bursts, ensuring no text is displayed during pure instrumental or firework segments.
